description: Pure general-knowledge query with no plausible business context; answer must use the exact refusal text, cite nothing, and coverage must be none.

must_include: I don't have information about that.
I can help with questions about people, companies, and activities in your workspace.
expected.notes: Guards Section 10.3 rule 7: out-of-scope queries respond with the EXACT refusal text; coverage=none; no citations; never answer from general knowledge. Devil's-advocate M14 strengthening: answer must not leak question terms ("Paris", "France", "capital") or year anchors ("2024"); the literal string "general knowledge" must not appear — the LLM must not explain why it is refusing; confidence must either be omitted or <= 0.5 since no sources exist.
